name: get_user
description: Look up a Twitter user profile by their username or user ID. Returns the user's display name, bio, follower and following counts, profile image, verification status, and account creation date. Use the 'by username' variant for human-readable lookups or the 'by ID' variant when you already have the numeric ID.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The Twitter username (handle) without the @ symbol. Used as a path parameter. Alternatively, use the /2/users/{id} endpoint with a numeric user ID.

parameters.name: user.fields
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of user fields to return. Options include: created_at, description, entities, location, pinned_tweet_id, profile_image_url, protected, public_metrics, url, verified, verified_type.

parameters.name: expansions
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of expansions. Options include: pinned_tweet_id.
